title: Avoid creating new Random objects each time
description: Creating new Random objects frequently can be inefficient. It's better to create a single Random instance and reuse it, or use ThreadLocalRandom for concurrent applications.
recommendation: Create a single Random instance as a static field or use ThreadLocalRandom.current().
impact: Improves performance by reducing object creation overhead.

compliant: private static final Random RANDOM = new Random();

checks.message: Avoid creating new Random objects repeatedly
